goal: Final qualification of the microstructure route into one of three honest statuses: confirmed true overlay, confirmed replacement layer, or watchlist/reject against immutable base active-signal-v1@1.
global_constraints: Never modify the immutable base snapshot active-signal-v1@1.
All key comparisons must use active-signal-v1@1 as the sole decision reference; @3 is auxiliary only.
Overlay and replacement tracks must never be mixed in the same narrative or run.
Every threshold must have documented provenance: quantile rule or selection-OOS search with frozen lockbox. No hand-tuned magic numbers.
All comparisons must be same-window: base @1, variant, and combined run on identical time windows.
Simple rules (bucket, threshold, quantile) must be evaluated before any model-based approach.
Short-only, long-only, and combined side splits must all be evaluated independently.
Old routes (IV, breadth, path-asymmetry, regime-disagreement, directional classification on old universe) are closed and must not be reopened.
No new data families or macro universe until microstructure qualification is complete.

slices.title: Honest replacement track vs base @1
slices.hypothesis: If overlay is weak or impossible, test microstructure as an honest replacement signal layer — a new snapshot compared head-to-head against base @1, with no overlay claims.
slices.objective: If overlay is weak or impossible, test microstructure as an honest replacement signal layer — a new snapshot compared head-to-head against base @1, with no overlay claims.
success_criteria: Final verdict on replacement track obtained: confirmed, weak, or rejected.
evidence_requirements: Final verdict on replacement track obtained: confirmed, weak, or rejected.

slices.title: Cannibalization, ownership and regime analysis
slices.hypothesis: Audit all surviving variants for cannibalization: whether improvement comes from removing bad trades or damaging profitable clusters, and identify regime-dependent behavior.
slices.objective: Audit all surviving variants for cannibalization: whether improvement comes from removing bad trades or damaging profitable clusters, and identify regime-dependent behavior.
success_criteria: Ownership/cannibalization map exists for all viable variants.
evidence_requirements: Ownership/cannibalization map exists for all viable variants.

slices.title: Does model layer add anything?
slices.hypothesis: Determine whether ML models (logistic, small CatBoost) provide meaningful improvement over simple microstructure rules, using fixed windows and labels without wide HPO.
slices.objective: Determine whether ML models (logistic, small CatBoost) provide meaningful improvement over simple microstructure rules, using fixed windows and labels without wide HPO.
success_criteria: Clear verdict: simple_rule_enough, model_adds_value, or model_not_worth_complexity.
evidence_requirements: Clear verdict: simple_rule_enough, model_adds_value, or model_not_worth_complexity.
